g.text: EPOLLERR and EPOLLHUP are always delivered

div.h2: EPOLLHUP & EPOLLERR — Kernel Error Event Dispatcher

div.p: Rule: Always test EPOLLERR | EPOLLHUP before EPOLLIN | EPOLLOUT. A single event can carry EPOLLIN and EPOLLERR simultaneously. Data after an error is unreliable — close immediately.
